'''''Beetle Nebula''''' was a [[Freebooter-class transport|''Freebooter''-class transport]] that arrived on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] in [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]] delivering troops home from the [[Battle of Hapes (Second Galactic Civil War)|Battle of Hapes]].

{{Ship-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Exile]]'' {{1st}}
